ogTitle: Huonbrook vs Hurlstone Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Huonbrook and Hurlstone Park.
heading: Huonbrook vs Hurlstone Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Huonbrook, New South Wales and Hurlstone Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Huonbrook has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hurlstone Park (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Huonbrook or Hurlstone Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Huonbrook has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Hurlstone Park scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Huonbrook scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Hurlstone Park scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Huonbrook or Hurlstone Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Huonbrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
